org.springframework.ai.mcp
Core support for Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration in Spring AI.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SyncMcpToolCallbackProvider
    McpToolCallbackAutoConfiguration.mcpToolCallbacks(org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<McpToolFilter> syncClientsToolFilter, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<List<io.modelcontextprotocol.client.McpSyncClient>> syncMcpClients, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<McpToolNamePrefixGenerator> mcpToolNamePrefixGenerator, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<ToolContextToMcpMetaConverter> toolContextToMcpMetaConverter)
    Creates tool callbacks for all configured MCP clients.
